title: Signed comparison fails for sizes not multiple of 8, or when reference value is read from a file

features.name: signed wire with non-8-bit-multiple width
features.description: Code should include a signed wire with bit width that is not a multiple of 8 (e.g., 17, 9, 33 bits)

features.name: signed logic with non-8-bit-multiple width
features.description: Code should include a signed logic variable with bit width that is not a multiple of 8

features.name: fscanf reading signed decimal from file
features.description: Code should include $fscanf reading a signed decimal value from a file into a signed variable

features.name: signed inequality comparison with file-read value
features.description: Code should include a signed inequality comparison where one operand is read from a file via $fscanf
features.snippet:
logic signed [16:0] op, opref;
if (op !== opref) $display("Mismatch");
